mapper.sql: a.id, a.user_id, a.category_id, a.title, a.summary, a.content, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.status, a.create_time, a.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , c.name as category_name, u.nickname as author_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT , c.name as category_name, u.nickname as author_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON a.user_id = u.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT , c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT , u.nickname as author_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN `user` u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT , c.name as category_name, u.nickname as author_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.status = #{status} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (user_id, category_id, title, summary, content, view_count, like_count, comment_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
